toolCalls.resultDisplay:
## 📂 Topic: **Session Initialized**

**Summary:**
I have initialized the session and analyzed the current workspace environment (Windows, C:\Users\user). I am ready to assist with any software engineering tasks, codebase investigations, or technical questions.

> [!STRATEGY]
> **Intent:** Awaiting user instructions to assist with software engineering tasks.

content:
Hello! I'm Gemini CLI, your AI software engineering assistant. I see we're in your home directory on Windows. 

How can I help you today? Whether you're looking to investigate a specific codebase, debug an issue, or start a new project, I'm ready to assist.
